attachments.text: Agree if your need is to just backup emails for a less often use google takeout is better and it is an official tool by google itself yes there are so many software’s available in the market but why pay extra or risk data to a 3rd party in case of a important data backup
attachments.title: How to Backup Gmail Mailboxes? [How-to Discussions]

attachments.fallback: Best Method to Convert OST Files to CSV? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are searching for a method to convert OST files to CSV, then you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/ost-to-pst-converter.php|SysInfo OST to PST Converter Tool>. This software helps you manage your OST files. It lets you convert them to PST (for Outlook) or many other file types. You can also send your OST emails right to cloud services like Gmail. It has handy features to filter mail and remove extra emails, all while keeping your folders…
attachments.title: Best Method to Convert OST Files to CSV? [How-to Discussions]
